title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kia India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kia India
jsonLd.description:
Kia India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!
